assertions.description: Analyzer correctly identified 47 footprints (front only), 2-layer board (F.Cu/B.Cu), 71.8x104.7mm board, 49 nets, routing_complete=true, 251 track segments, 1 via, 2 zones. All match the PCB file contents.
assertions.aspirational_reason: auto-generated check path incorrect for PCB/gerber output

assertions.description: The ESP32 DevKit (U8) has 3 GND pins marked unconnected (GND_J2_14, GND_J3_1, GND_J3_7) — each becomes its own isolated ground domain. Analyzer correctly reports 4 ground domains and flags U8 as a multi-domain component. This is a real PCB design concern.
assertions.aspirational_reason: auto-generated check path incorrect for PCB/gerber output

assertions.description: The analyzer identified courtyard overlaps for components placed too close together or overlapping. The J14/J2 overlap of 110.9mm² and negative edge clearances (J14 at -3.81mm) indicate the board has real placement violations. This is accurate.

assertions.description: The board height of 104.7mm exceeds the 100mm standard tier at JLCPCB, triggering higher pricing. Analyzer correctly identifies this as a DFM violation in the 'board_size' parameter.
